{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603240015512E15EE50A29E7D214B9D"}"},"total":85},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7617873261160301374","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"太他妈好看了，不够看，作者快更，好久没有看到质量这么高的精灵文了"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773677910,"group_id":"7601763688265026622","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"帅哥，本人高大，帅气，威猛，是社会主义接班人，新时代好少年","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N0FA+0YZwVHZzAoWYs8A8Xlp0/VHYoq7lkQc/++I73IB","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"1579334561438935","user_name":"念雨风行"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1579334561438935","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1772186890,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"活动专属","bg_color":"#E5FAF9","can_worn":false,"id":33,"name":"巅峰品鉴官","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/66e862e57c3d2bb30fe45e7b14498a89","sticker_type":2,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/66e862e57c3d2bb30fe45e7b14498a89"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7601763688265026622","book_info":{"abstract":"【神奇宝贝+平民+慢节奏+都市宝可梦+系统+非无敌文+每天五章】
陆渊一睁眼，回到了高中时代，却发现这个世界早已不是记忆中的模样。
千年以来，精灵与人类共存，现实却远比动漫残酷。
底层训练家被困于资源牢笼，上层世家垄断一切变强的可能。
“没事，儿子，大不了做个山二代。”
陆渊看着周围压得人喘不过气的四面大山。
“还真是山二代……”
可天无绝人之路！
逆命系统出现——
普通资质精灵？一秒入道馆！
劣品能量方块？一键升阶！
当所有人嘲笑他选择了最弱的黑色独角虫时。
陆渊知道，属于平民的时代，将由这一刻开始改写。
校园赛上他初露锋芒，全国高考中他横扫世家天骄。
从最低级的秘境到世界级秘境。
从小凤凰杯的崭露头角到世界学府大赛的巅峰对决……
他踏出的每一步，都成为无数平民训练家心中的灯塔。
……
多年后。
“火箭队”之名让世界颤抖。
新晋天骄跪在陨落的神兽前崩溃：“为什么……一只大针蜂能弑神？！”
联盟女神在深夜独自呢喃：“倾国容颜，终不及他一句随我颠覆这世界。”
当全球天王与冠军集结十万大山，围剿这位“黑暗掌门人”——
陆渊负手立于山巅，身后是万千从底层崛起的面孔。
他望向铺天盖地的强敌，淡淡一句：
“这天下英雄，真是多如过江之鲫啊！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/94f38d714dc2c84f38da5788c59daf54","author":"蒜头王八老安","author_id":"","book_id":"7601763688265026622","book_name":"精灵：开局独角虫，你成天王了？","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#202028","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"5.2万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":36,"name":"重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36&name=重生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":859,"name":"宝可梦","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=859&name=宝可梦&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7601814642310005310","read_count":"51648","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"431890"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.4","serial_count":"198","tags":"动漫衍生,衍生,同人,宝可梦,重生,系统,开局","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o192b56c7f1433133088ce71f3cfd0bc2~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779466551&x-signature=K%2BzfdozEqxGohS5Gr7qp9LlDJXg%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1227469490499053","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"140"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603240015512E15EE50A29E7D214B9D"}"},"relate_info_list":[
